name: Pumpkin Ravioli
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine pumpkin, ricotta, nutmeg, salt, and pepper.
2. In a smaller bowl, whisk together egg and milk; set aside.
3. On a clean work surface, place several wonton wrappers down. Spoon 1 tbsp of filling in the center of each wonton wrapper. Brush edges with egg wash. Cover ravioli with another wonton wrapper and seal edges with a ravioli cutter.
4. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook raviolis in batches, making sure they don't stick together. Cook for 2-4 minutes.
5. Drain and toss in Parmesan Butter Sauce.
Parmesan Butter Sauce:
1. In a large saute pan, reduce chicken stock until thick, about halfway. Add butter. Stir in parmesan and parsley. Season with salt and pepper.
